name: Redux (传统用法)
reason: Redux Toolkit 成为官方推荐，传统 createStore 已标记 deprecated
warning: @reduxjs/toolkit is now the official way to write Redux logic.

name: Create React App (CRA)
reason: React 官方文档不再推荐，仓库已归档，最后更新 2022 年
warning: This project is no longer maintained.

name: Enzyme (React 测试库)
reason: 不支持 React 18+，Airbnb 已停止维护
warning: Enzyme is not compatible with React 18.

name: Heroku GitHub 集成
reason: 2022 年因安全事件暂停后恢复，但 Heroku 整体在收缩
warning: Heroku 持续缩减免费和低价服务

name: OpenAI GPT-3 系列 API
reason: text-davinci-003 等模型陆续下线，被 GPT-3.5/4 取代
warning: Legacy GPT-3 models are being retired on a rolling basis.

name: npm shrinkwrap
reason: package-lock.json 已成为默认，shrinkwrap 几乎无人使用
warning: npm-shrinkwrap.json 仍被支持但不再推荐

name: Safari 传统扩展格式
reason: Apple 要求所有扩展迁移到 Web Extension API 格式
warning: Legacy Safari extensions will stop working in future macOS releases.

name: Chrome Extension Manifest V2
reason: Google 强制迁移到 Manifest V3，V2 扩展将无法在 Chrome 上运行
warning: Manifest V2 extensions will be disabled in Chrome in June 2025.

name: 仍依赖 Python 2 的库
reason: Python 2 于 2020 年 EOL，但仍有库未迁移到 Python 3
warning: Python 2 has reached end-of-life. No security patches will be released.

name: Docker Hub 免费团队计划
reason: Docker 持续收紧免费额度，限制拉取次数，删除不活跃镜像
alternative: GitHub Container Registry, AWS ECR Public
warning: Docker Hub 免费用户受到越来越多限制
